consistency.notes: The item description is internally consistent. Mechanics like activation, trapping, cell capacity, freeing, and communication are clearly defined and follow established rules logic.

quality.notes: The item is high quality, featuring unique mechanics (trapping, extradimensional cells) with defined limits (12 cells, DC 15 save, vulnerability to bludgeoning). The flavor text about faint images enhances its theme.

mechanics.activation: Action to activate/deactivate; requires being within 5 feet.

trapping_mechanism.effect: Trapped in one of 12 extradimensional cells (infinite fog, reduced visibility to 10ft, no aging/need for sustenance).

mechanics.limitations: Only 12 cells available; overloading triggers a random expulsion.
mechanics.interaction: Can communicate with trapped creatures (action) or free one creature (action/second command word).

item_summary.name: Mirror of Life Trapping
item_summary.core_function: Traps creatures within 30 feet into one of twelve extradimensional cells upon failing a DC 15 Charisma save.
